_**Agent (composer-2.5-fast)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I have finished reviewing both pages. I am now compiling the exact comparison report with file paths, class names, and animation CSS differences.

The homepage uses a shared `Reveal` component for scroll-triggered animations across all five sections. It contains no `@keyframes` or `animation` properties. The about page uses no `Reveal` component at all. Its hero section alone contains `@keyframes` and `animation` properties for page-load effects. The remaining about sections rely solely on hover transitions for images and CTAs. The homepage sections have no entrance animations.

About page `Reveal` usage details:

- **OurStory**: default fadeUp on `.heading`, delay 120ms on `.body`, image variant with delay 220ms on `.media`. CSS hover adds `translateY(-6px)` and `scale(1.02)` to `.image`.
- **HistoryIntro**: default fadeUp on `.heading`, delay 120ms on `.body`.
- **Timeline**: image variant on each entry image, delays 100ms, 200ms, and 300ms on `.year`, `.title`, and `.body`.

- **ThenAndNow**: Reveal on `.heading` with delay 100ms. First `.body` at 200ms. `.questions p` entries stagger at 250ms, 350ms, and 450ms. Second `.body` at 550ms.
- **AboutCta**: Reveal on `.heading` at 0ms. `.body` at 120ms. `.cta` at 220ms. Five `.arcImage` elements animate via image variant with delays 320ms through 720ms.

Reveal.module.css defines `.fadeUp` with translateY(1.5rem) and `.image` with translateY(0.75rem) scale(0.97). Both use the same 0.85s transition. The homepage hero contains unique `@keyframes` named `slideIn` (translateX -1.5rem) and `fadeUp` (translateY 1.25rem). The homepage title animates with `fadeUp` over 0.85s and `.column2` uses `slideIn` over 1s.

## Architecture difference

| | **About** | **Home** |
|---|---|---|
| Entrance animation system | Shared `Reveal` component (scroll-triggered CSS **transitions**) | `@keyframes` + `animation` **only in Hero** |
| `@keyframes` in page CSS | None | `fadeUp`, `slideIn` in Hero |
| Sections animated on scroll | All 5 | 0 (Hero animates on load only) |

---

## 1. About page — components & animation CSS

### Shared: `Reveal` (`c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\ui\Reveal.tsx`)

Used by every about section. Applies CSS module classes: `.root`, `.fadeUp` / `.image`, `.inView`.

**File:** `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\components\ui\Reveal.module.css`

```css
.fadeUp,
.image {
  opacity: 0;
  transition:
    opacity 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1),
    transform 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay); /* set via inline style from delay prop */
}

.fadeUp { transform: translateY(1.5rem); }
.image { transform: translateY(0.75rem) scale(0.97); }
.inView { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
```

**Trigger:** IntersectionObserver at `threshold: 0.15`; adds `.inView` once visible.

---

### `OurStory` — `components\about\OurStory.tsx` + `OurStory.module.css`

| Element | Reveal config |
|---|---|
| `.heading` | default `fadeUp`, delay `0` |
| `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `120` |
| `.media` (image block) | `variant="image"`, delay `220` |

**Hover animation** (local CSS, not Reveal):

```css
.image { transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.media:hover .image { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02); }
```

---

### `HistoryIntro` — `components\about\HistoryIntro.tsx` + `HistoryIntro.module.css`

| Element | Reveal config |
|---|---|
| `.heading` | `fadeUp`, delay `0` |
| `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `120` |

No local animation CSS beyond Reveal.

---

### `Timeline` — `components\about\Timeline.tsx` + `Timeline.module.css`

Per timeline entry (×6):

| Element | Reveal config |
|---|---|
| `.image` (in `.media`) | `variant="image"`, delay `0` |
| `.year` | `fadeUp`, delay `100` |
| `.title` | `fadeUp`, delay `200` |
| `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `300` |

**Hover animation:**

```css
.image { transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.media:hover .image { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02); }
```

---

### `ThenAndNow` — `components\about\ThenAndNow.tsx` + `ThenAndNow.module.css`

| Element | Reveal config |
|---|---|
| `.label` | `fadeUp`, delay `0` |
| `.heading` | `fadeUp`, delay `100` |
| first `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `200` |
| `.questions p` (×3) | `fadeUp`, delays `250`, `350`, `450` |
| second `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `550` |

No local animation CSS beyond Reveal.

---

### `AboutCta` — `components\about\AboutCta.tsx` + `AboutCta.module.css`

| Element | Reveal config |
|---|---|
| `.heading` | `fadeUp`, delay `0` |
| `.body` | `fadeUp`, delay `120` |
| `.cta` | `fadeUp`, delay `220` |
| `.arcImage` (×5) | `variant="image"`, delays `320`, `420`, `520`, `620`, `720` |

**Hover animation:**

```css
.arcImage { transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.arcItem:hover .arcImage { transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02); }
```

**Static layout transforms** (desktop arc shape, not animated):

```css
.arcItem:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(10deg); }
.arcItem:nth-child(2) { transform: translateY(70px) rotate(5deg); }
/* ... etc */
```

---

## 2. Homepage — components & animation CSS

**Page:** `c:\Users\terra\Projects\CourtneyJohnson\alic-redesign\app\page.tsx`  
Components: `Hero`, `Foundation`, `Work`, `InMotion`, `Purpose`  
**No `Reveal` usage anywhere in `components/home/`.**

---

### `Hero` — `components\home\Hero.module.css` (only section with entrance animations)

**Keyframes:**

```css
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(1.25rem); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes slideIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-1.5rem); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}
```

**Applied to:**

| Class | Animation |
|---|---|
| `.column2` | `slideIn 1s cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1) both` |
| `.title` | `fadeUp 0.85s cubic-bezier(...) both` (no delay) |
| `.body` | `fadeUp 0.85s cubic-bezier(...) both; animation-delay: 120ms` |
| `.cta` | `fadeUp 0.85s cubic-bezier(...) both; animation-delay: 220ms` |

**Hover only:** `.cta { transition: opacity 0.2s ease; }`

---

### `Foundation` — `Foundation.module.css`

No entrance animation. Only:

```css
.cta { transition: opacity 0.2s ease; }
.cta:hover { opacity: 0.9; }
```

---

### `Work` — `Work.module.css`

No entrance animation. Image hover only:

```css
.image { transition: transform 0.4s ease; }
.media:hover .image { transform: scale(1.05); }  /* scale only, no translateY */
```

CTA: same opacity hover as Foundation.

---

### `InMotion` — `InMotion.module.css`

No animation or transition CSS (layout `transform: none` rules only).

---

### `Purpose` — `Purpose.module.css`

No entrance animation. Only `.secondaryCta` opacity hover transition.

---

## 3. Exact differences — what About has that Home lacks

### A. Scroll-triggered `Reveal` system (biggest gap)

About wraps content in `<Reveal>` across all 5 sections. Home has **zero** scroll reveals below Hero.

**To match on home:** import `Reveal` into `Foundation`, `Work`, `InMotion`, `Purpose` and wrap headings/copy/images with the same delay patterns.

---

### B. `image` variant entrance

About uses `variant="image"` on hero images, timeline photos, and CTA arc images:

```css
transform: translateY(0.75rem) scale(0.97);  /* initial */
transform: translateY(0) scale(1);           /* .inView */
```

Home Hero image (`.column2`) uses **`slideIn`** (horizontal), not the image variant:

```css
transform: translateX(-1.5rem);  /* initial */
```

Home sections below Hero have **no image entrance at all**.

---

### C. Staggered scroll delays beyond Hero

About delay ladder examples home lacks:

| Section | Delays used |
|---|---|
| ThenAndNow | `0, 100, 200, 250, 350, 450, 550` |
| Timeline (per row) | image `0`, year `100`, title `200`, body `300` |
| AboutCta arc | `320 + index * 100` (up to `720ms`) |

Home only staggers Hero on **page load**: `.body` `120ms`, `.cta` `220ms`. Nothing else staggers.

---

### D. Image hover: `translateY + scale` vs `scale` only

About (OurStory, Timeline, AboutCta):

```css
transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.02);
```

Home Work:

```css
transform: scale(1.05);
```

Home Foundation/InMotion/Purpose images have **no hover animation**.

---

### E. `prefers-reduced-motion` handling

About Reveal + image hovers disable motion:

```css
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .fadeUp, .image { opacity: 1; transform: none; transition: none; }
}
```

Home Hero has **no** reduced-motion override for its `@keyframes` animations.

---

### F. Minor `fadeUp` offset difference

| | Initial Y offset |
|---|---|
| Home Hero `@keyframes fadeUp` | `1.25rem` |
| About Reveal `.fadeUp` | `1.5rem` |

Same easing (`cubic-bezier(0.645, 0.045, 0.355, 1)`) and duration (`0.85s`).

---

## What Home has that About lacks

- **`@keyframes slideIn`** on `.column2` — horizontal hero image entrance
- **Page-load `@keyframes`** (fire once on mount, not scroll) for Hero text/CTA
- **Work image hover** `scale(1.05)` without vertical lift

---

## Quick match guide

To give home the about feel:

1. Add `Reveal` to `Foundation.tsx`, `Work.tsx`, `InMotion.tsx`, `Purpose.tsx`
2. Reuse `components/ui/Reveal.module.css` as-is (shared)
3. Mirror delay patterns from analogous about sections (e.g. heading `0`, body `120`, image `variant="image"` + `220`)
4. Optionally align Work hover to about's `translateY(-6px) scale(1.02)` in `Work.module.css`
5. Optionally add `prefers-reduced-motion` to `Hero.module.css` or migrate Hero to `Reveal` for consistency
